title: Branch consolidation — collapse all `claude/*` branches into main

title: Swedish-optimised ASR for the podcast pipeline
motivation: Moves **T6** (data quality / source) and **T7** (data quality / freshness) for the podcast-signal layer: lower transcription WER raises the share of episodes yielding usable, correctly-attributed signals
